originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&pid_output` is never used.

presenceCondition: (and (= MARLIN_H false) (= PIDTEMP true) (= PID_DEBUG false))
model:
(define-fun PID_DEBUG () Bool
  false)
(define-fun MARLIN_H () Bool
  false)
(define-fun PIDTEMP () Bool
  true)
reasoning: When PIDTEMP=T: pid_output=1 at L11 is never read (no code uses pid_output). Dead store. With PID_DEBUG=F, the '#ifdef PID_DEBUG' block (L15-17 with SERIAL_ECHO_START) is skipped, so MARLIN_H is irrelevant to compilation. The dead store occurs for any PIDTEMP=T config that compiles (including MARLIN_H=T AND PID_DEBUG=F, or MARLIN_H=F AND PID_DEBUG=T). No '// ERROR' for pid_output dead store → new bug not in VBDB. PC adds MARLIN_H=F and PID_DEBUG=F unnecessarily. Over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
